summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hunyuan Video AI generation platform. All backend APIs, frontend features, and integrations are working perfectly. Mock video generation with Google Cloud Storage videos is functional and ready for real Hunyuan Video integration.
passed_tests: Backend /api/generate-video accepts prompts and returns mock videos
Backend validation rejects prompts under 10 characters
Frontend page loads with correct title and description
Prompt textarea validation works with toast notifications
All 4 style presets (Cinematic, Anime, Cyberpunk, 3D Render) are functional
Video generation flow with loading states and progress bar
Generated videos display in video player with controls
Download button is present and accessible
History sidebar shows recent generations and updates correctly
History item clicking switches displayed videos
Error handling for short prompts displays proper messages
Loading states disable inputs during generation
Mock video generation completes in 3-5 seconds as expected
Design follows Studio Light guidelines with proper fonts and colors
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (18/18 features working), Integration: 100%
